氵.notes: water radical (3-stroke), appears in 河/海/洗/汉 etc.

艹.notes: grass/plant radical (2-stroke top), appears in 花/草/茶 etc.

纟.notes: silk radical simplified, appears in 红/线/绿 etc.

钅.notes: metal radical simplified, appears in 钱/银/铁 etc.

饣.notes: food radical simplified, appears in 饭/饮/饿 etc.

辶.notes: walk/movement radical simplified form, appears in 进/边/道 etc.

辵.notes: archaic walk/movement radical, canonical ancestor of 辶

阝.notes: left-position = mound/hill radical (阜), right-position = city (邑); context-dependent

罒.notes: net radical variant (4-stroke form of 网/罔), appears in 罗/置/署 etc.

疒.notes: sickness/disease radical, appears in 病/疼/痛 etc.

虍.notes: tiger radical (top portion), appears in 虎/虑/虚 etc.

攴.notes: beat/strike with hand radical, Kangxi radical 66

攵.notes: strike radical right-hand variant of 攴, appears in 教/收/数 etc.

宀.notes: roof/shelter radical, appears in 家/宝/宫 etc. — Kangxi radical 40

冫.notes: ice radical (2-stroke), appears in 冷/冰/准 etc.

卩.notes: kneeling person / seal radical, Kangxi radical 26; appears in 即/却/卷

厶.notes: private/self radical, Kangxi radical 28; appears in 去/县/参

廾.notes: two hands radical, Kangxi radical 55; appears in 弄/开/异

彡.notes: hair/feather/decoration radical, Kangxi radical 59; appears in 形/彩/须

巛.notes: river/stream radical, variant of 川, Kangxi radical 47

丿.notes: slash stroke radical, Kangxi radical 4; minimal component

乚.notes: hidden/bent stroke radical variant of 乙, Kangxi radical 5

冂.notes: open box/boundary radical, Kangxi radical 13; appears in 冈/内/再

囗.notes: enclosure/boundary radical (large square), Kangxi radical 31; appears in 国/图/园

夂.notes: go slowly downward radical, Kangxi radical 34; appears in 夏/复/各

夊.notes: variant of 夂, slow walk downward; appears in 夏/夔

弇.notes: cover/lid radical component; appears in phonetic series

勹.notes: wrap/embrace radical, Kangxi radical 20; appears in 勺/包/匍

壮.notes: listed in phantom set but 壮 IS simplified Chinese — may be a data artifact

斎.notes: Japanese simplified form of 斋; technically not a traditional-simplified pair in Chinese but functionally similar

於.notes: classical Chinese preposition; standalone char and also literary variant — classification borderline

杉.notes: standalone character for cedar/fir; appears here possibly as phonetic component in other chars

楞.notes: standalone character (Leng); appearance as phantom may be as component in 棱 etc.

査.notes: Japanese simplified/variant of 查; usage in Chinese contexts uncertain

竘.notes: tall/proud; unclear if purely archaic component or has trad-simplified status

竷.notes: archaic movement component; very rare, classification uncertain

_metadata.notes: Some characters appear in multiple categories (duplicates noted inline). The counts are approximate due to cross-listing. The radical_variants list is the most actionable for the learning plan system. Some uncertain entries are high-confidence archaic components listed there for human review before committing to the system.

most_actionable_radical_variants.rationale: Extremely common water radical in hundreds of chars
Full silk radical — canonical Kangxi form
